description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. A single dark, irregular-shaped object is visible just above the center of the reticle. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B24
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. A single dark, irregular-shaped object is visible just above the center of the reticle.
reported_object_description: A single dark, irregular-shaped object visible just above the center of a reticle in a grainy, monochrome image.
bust_reasoning: The document provides only a single, grainy, monochrome image of a small, dark, irregular-shaped object. There are no descriptions of behavior, kinematics, or corroborating sensor data or witnesses. This extreme lack of detail makes it impossible to rule out numerous mundane explanations, placing it firmly in the category of easily explainable phenomena based on limited evidence.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B24 - Page 1

[redacted]

[Image: A grainy, black-and-white photograph featuring a crosshair centered on a small, dark, unidentified object. There are several [redacted] bars on the left and right sides of the frame.]

12/31/99 18:19:40
cover_up_reasoning: The document contains minimal redactions, specifically '[redacted]' text and '[redacted] bars' in the image description. These appear to be routine withholdings, likely of minor details or non-critical information, and do not suggest substantial concealment or suppression of critical information.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常现象解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份关于未识别异常现象（UAP）的报告，该报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像。原始图像在提交给AARO之前经过了编辑处理。未提供随附任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。图像中的日期（12/31/99）因系统日期/时间未设置而有误。该单色图像呈现颗粒感纹理，并带有简化的中心十字线。一个深色、不规则形状的物体位于分划板中心正上方。
reported_object_description_zh: 一张颗粒感单色图像中，位于分划板中心正上方可见一个深色、不规则形状的物体。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件仅提供一张小型、深色、不规则形状物体的颗粒感单色图像。没有关于行为、运动学或佐证传感器数据或目击者的描述。这种极度缺乏细节的情况使得无法排除众多世俗解释，鉴于证据有限，将其明确归类为易于解释的现象。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件包含少量编辑处理，具体为图像描述中的“【已编辑】”文本和“【已编辑】条”。这些似乎是例行性保留，可能涉及次要细节或非关键信息，不表明存在重大隐瞒或压制关键信息的情况。
claims: FBI submitted a UAP report to AARO
Report consists of a still image from a U.S. military system
Original imagery was altered with redactions
Accompanying mission report was not provided
Operator unable to positively identify the UAP
Image date (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交了一份UAP报告
报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像
原始图像经过了编辑处理
操作员无法明确识别该UAP
图像日期（12/31/99）因系统日期/时间未设置而有误
bust_explanations: Bird, bat, or insect at close range, appearing as a dark, irregular shape in a grainy image.
Lens flare or camera artifact, which can manifest as dark, irregular shapes in low-quality or monochrome images.
Floating debris (e.g., Mylar balloon, plastic bag) that is dark and irregular-shaped, especially if out of focus or distant.
bust_explanations_zh: 近距离的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫，在颗粒感图像中呈现为深色、不规则形状。
镜头光晕或相机伪影，在低质量或单色图像中可能表现为深色、不规则形状。
漂浮物（例如，聚酯薄膜气球、塑料袋），呈深色、不规则形状，尤其是在失焦或距离较远的情况下。
cover_up_indicators_zh: 文本的例行性编辑处理
图像细节的编辑处理（“【已编辑】条”)
